productDisplayName: Tantra Men's Who Are You Blue T-shirt
description: Composition:Mint blue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort Fitt-shirts speak the minds of youth today, with many things unsaid finally revealed. Don this tantra tee to send out a strong message to the weirdo at the mall, geek in your college or the unwanted Romeo on the street. Pair this with jeans or cargos for that uber cool look.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
